languages.text: "Все верно, капитан. Без благоволения Бога-Машины этого никогда бы не случилось".
"Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."
languages.original_text: "Все верно, капитан. Без благоволения Бога-Машины этого никогда бы не случилось".

traits.locale_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."
"Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."
"Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

languages.text: «Tiene razón, capitán. Esto no habría sido posible de no ser por la gracia del Dios Máquina».
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón, capitán. Esto no habría sido posible de no ser por la gracia del Dios Máquina».

languages.text: “说得对，上尉。如果没有万机之神的恩典，这根本无法实现。”
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: “说得对，上尉。如果没有万机之神的恩典，这根本无法实现。”

languages.text: « Tout à fait, capitaine. Rien de tout cela n'aurait été possible sans la faveur du Dieu-Machine. »
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: « Tout à fait, capitaine. Rien de tout cela n'aurait été possible sans la faveur du Dieu-Machine. »

languages.text: "Çok haklısın Yüzbaşı. Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu olmadan bu mümkün olmazdı."
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: "Çok haklısın Yüzbaşı. Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu olmadan bu mümkün olmazdı."

languages.text: "Wohl wahr, Captain. Ohne die Gnade des Maschinengottes wäre das nicht möglich gewesen."
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: "Wohl wahr, Captain. Ohne die Gnade des Maschinengottes wäre das nicht möglich gewesen."

languages.text: 「まさにその通りです、艦長。機械神のご加護がなければ、不可能でした」
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Captain. It would not have been possible without the grace of the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: 「まさにその通りです、艦長。機械神のご加護がなければ、不可能でした」
